name: specky-sdd
description: Specky — 57 MCP tools for Spec-Driven Development. 10-phase pipeline, enterprise security (rate limiting, HMAC state integrity, RBAC, hash-chained audit), model routing guidance, context tiering, cognitive debt metrics, EARS notation, 17 diagram types.

scripts.build: tsc && cp -r templates dist/templates && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/index.js';const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(!c.startsWith('#!'))fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c)" && chmod +x dist/index.js

author: Paula Silva <paulasilvatech@github.com> (https://github.com/paulasilvatech)
